payload.label: sink
payload.long_description: Edge-cropped close view of a stainless-steel double-basin kitchen sink with visible rim and partition, reflective scratched metal finish and light water marks; both basins are partially visible and the faucet is out of frame, approximately 0.6 m from the camera.
